case_title: SEYFARTH SHAW VS. RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS DBA PACIFIC CEMENT COMPANY

docket_entries.description: ATTORNEY'S CERTIFICATE IN SUPPORT OF CONFESSING JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS DBA PACIFIC CEMENT COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1134 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAW, SEYFARTH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS DBA PACIFIC CEMENT COMPANY $22,549.50 PRINCIPAL, $1,500.00 INTEREST, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,064.50, *** IT IS FURTHER ORDERED, PLAINTIFF SHALL NOT SEEK TO ENFORCE THIS JUDGMENT UNTIL 4/7/07 ***. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CONFESSION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, SEYFARTH AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS DBA PACIFIC CEMENT COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY HENDERSON, MICHAEL J
